etimesWoman’s innovative idea to get a seat in Mumbai local crosses 3 million views– watch hereA clever solution to Mumbai's crowded local trains has gone viral. A woman was filmed ingeniously using a portable folding stool to create her own seat amidst a packed compartment. Her simple, yet effective, method of securing a spot while others stood has resonated with millions, perfectly capturing the daily commute struggle.

etimesWho is Kyle Long? The Ohio man charged with wife’s murder after claiming she stabbed herself 17 times – what to know about the caseA husband in London, Ohio, faces murder charges. His wife's death, initially thought to be self-inflicted, is now considered a homicide. Investigators found inconsistencies in his account. Autopsy revealed defensive wounds.
